ab: kaysa’an kamatortoroe’ ’am maraS ’inimon rima’ ray koko:ol.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去山上。
en: I will take you to the mountains today.

ch: B:媽媽說山上有很多蚊子。
en: Mom says that there are lots of mosquitoes in the mountains.

ab: kamatortoroe’ kaysa’an ’am maraS ’inimon rima’ ray pinatiyay.
ch: A:老師今天要帶你們去田裡。
en: I will take you to the fields.

ab: yami ’am rima’ manibih ay ka ra:i’ ?
en: Are we going to loosen the soil?
Where are we going today?
Teacher will take us to the riverside.
Where are we going today?
Teacher will take us to the mountains today.
Are we going to the riverside today?

ch: B:不是，老師要帶我們去山上。
en: No, our teacher is going to take us to the mountains.
Are we going to the mountains today?

ch: B:不是，我們今天要去田裡。
en: No, we are going to the fields.

ab: kamatortoroe’, ’ita’ ray ba:la’ ’am komita’ ka kano’?
ch: A:老師，我們到河邊要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see at the riverside?
We are going to see dragonflies.

ab: kamatortoroe’, ’ita’ rima’ ray koko:ol ’am komita’ ka kano’?
ch: A:老師，我們到山上要看什麼?
en: Teacher, what are we going to see in the mountains?
We are going to see butterflies.
What are we going to do in the fields?

ab: ’ita’ ’am rima’ ray pinatiyayan komita’ mita’ pinamowa’ ka basaeh, ’iya’azem ka ’ae’aewzaeh ki walwalo’ o.
ch: B:我們要到田裡看我們種的玉米，要小心有螞蟻、蜜蜂唷!
en: We are going to see the corn we grow in the fields, but you need to be aware of the ants and bees.

ch: A:老師我們要到河邊游泳嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to swim in the river?
No, we are going to see dragonflies.

ab: kamatortoroe’ ’ita’ ’am rima’ ray pinatiyayan mamowa’ ka por’oe’ ay?
ch: A:老師我們要到田裡種菜嗎?
en: Teacher, are we going to grow some vegetables in the fields?
We are going to loosen the soil today.
There are dragonflies flying around.

ab: yako kaysa’an ila komita’ ka ’ima ’i’iyaeh ka ’ayloSay.
ch: B:我今天才看過真正活著的蜻蜓。
en: Today is the first time I see real living dragonflies.

ab: hiza hayza’ ka papa:o’ mam homayhayap.
en: There are butterflies flying around.

ab: wa! ya:o minowa’ ka papa:o’, kayzaeh a tomal kita’en
ch: B:耶!哇!我喜歡蝴蝶，很漂亮。
en: Yeh! Wow! I love butterflies. They are very beautiful.
There are butterflies flying around.
Those are not butterflies. They are bees.

ch: A:在這裡看一看，不要到太遠的地方唷!
en: Come here and take a look. Don’t go too far!

ch: B:好，我們不會去太遠的地方。
en: Got it, we won’t go anywhere too far.

ch: A:不要用跑的，慢慢走免得跌倒了。
en: Don’t run and walk slowly lest you fall down.
I want to see them right away.
